label: FAILED
technicalConclusion: The local DPAPI secret is available and readable. The blocker is the live backend /api/license/validate route returning HTTP 500, not a missing local key.

changes: login lookup now supports username/email through a fallback-safe account lookup
license validate payload masks licenseKey, boundHwid and incomingHwid in all cases
account lookup falls back to email-only if emailNormalized lookup fails at runtime

nextRequiredAction: Deploy backend commit 215ce1a to Render or provide Render API/deploy hook access so Codex can trigger the deploy without printing secrets.
